bag.labelWithoutName: Unnamed label: it cannot be added to the bag.
bag.duplicateLabel: This label is already present in the bag.
bag.maxAdversities: The maximum limit of 4 Adversities has been reached.
bag.maxFears: The maximum limit of 3 Fears has been reached.
bag.maxDangers: The maximum limit of 4 Dangers has been reached.
bag.drawThreeRequiresDanger: At least one Danger must be present in the bag to perform the initial draw.
bag.riskRequiresInitialDraw: You can take a risk only after completing the initial draw.
bag.riskAlreadyCompleted: You have already taken a risk during this test. Clear the bag to begin a new test.
bag.initialDrawAlreadyCompleted: The initial draw has already been completed. Clear the bag to begin a new test.
bag.bagLocked: The bag cannot be changed after the initial draw. Clear it to begin a new test.

sheet.mConcept: A short sentence describing the character

dialog.qLabels: How many labels do you want to draw?
